perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with two women running towards the camera in front of a modern, multi-story grey stone villa. One woman wears a blue ruffled dress and a white bucket hat, the other wears a beige top and skirt. (2) They enter the house, revealing a large living room with a massive grey sectional sofa. A small white dog in a pink sweater runs around the wooden floor. (3) The camera follows them to a spacious kitchen with a large white round dining table, then up a floating staircase. (4) They explore multiple bedrooms with floor-to-ceiling windows, highlighting the sunlight and views of Tainan's urban landscape at sunset. (5) One woman is seen taking a selfie in a large bathroom mirror. (6) The video concludes with the women playing with the dog in the living room as the sun sets outside.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music starts immediately. A female voice begins narrating in Mandarin with an excited, high-pitched, and welcoming tone. (2) The music continues at a steady, fast pace throughout the house tour, maintaining the energetic atmosphere. (3) No ambient noise is heard during the tour, suggesting a studio-quality voiceover was added. (4) At the very end of the video, the background music fades slightly to let the sound of the small dog barking and the women laughing be heard clearly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text: "我們在台南住到一個超棒的陽光別墅" (We stayed in a super awesome sunny villa in Tainan). (2) Functional text describing features: "廣大的沙發" (Huge sofa), "超大圓桌" (Super large round table), "懸浮樓梯" (Floating staircase), "全面採光" (Full natural lighting). (3) Decorative/Hook text: "寵物友善" (Pet-friendly) with colorful font. (4) Closing sticker: "i love 台南" with flower icons.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Living Room -> Kitchen -> Bedrooms -> Bathroom -> Outro

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One female in a layered blue dress and white NY-branded bucket hat; one female in a neutral beige/cream outfit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern, minimalist luxury villa with clean lines, grey stone exterior, wooden flooring, and massive glass windows showing a city view.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Natural light, golden hour sunset glow.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Living Spaces -> Bedroom Highlights -> Pet-friendly Policy -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a promotional vlog for a luxury, pet-friendly villa in Tainan. It utilizes fast-paced editing and high-energy narration to showcase the house's modern design, spaciousness, and sunset views, specifically targeting groups or families traveling with pets.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed room tour, highlight of specific amenities (elevator, IH stove), and specific mentions of pet-friendly policies without cleaning fees.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Variety-show style captions and high-energy Mandarin narration common in Taiwanese lifestyle vlogs.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video emphasizes 'sunny' and 'pet-friendly' as its core selling points, likely targeting young urban professionals in Taiwan looking for weekend getaways.
